name: gongwen-writer
description: Professional official document writing expert for Chinese state-owned enterprises, specializing in party committee, board of directors, and management meeting materials

displayDescription.en: Expert in Chinese state-owned enterprise official document writing, specializing in party committee, board, and management meeting materials with GB/T 9704 compliance
displayDescription.zh: 精通国企七大文种写作，严格遵循GB/T 9704公文标准，确保格式规范、用语精准、逻辑严密
